data.name: Editor_Title
data.value: Edit Image

data.name: Editor_Loading
data.value: Loading editor...

data.name: Editor_PageTitle
data.value: Edit Image - {0}

data.name: Btn_ReplaceOriginal
data.value: Replace original

data.name: Btn_SaveAsCopy
data.value: Save as copy

data.name: Btn_BackToAsset
data.value: Back to asset

data.name: Btn_EditImage
data.value: Edit Image

data.name: Btn_Retry
data.value: Try again

data.name: SaveDialog_Title
data.value: Save edited image

data.name: SaveDialog_ReplaceDescription
data.value: Overwrite the current image. The previous version will be permanently replaced.

data.name: SaveDialog_CopyDescription
data.value: Create a new asset with the edited image. The original stays untouched.

data.name: SaveDialog_ConfirmReplaceTitle
data.value: Replace original?

data.name: SaveDialog_ConfirmReplaceMessage
data.value: The original image will be overwritten and cannot be recovered.

data.name: SaveDialog_ConfirmCopyTitle
data.value: Save as new asset?

data.name: SaveDialog_ConfirmCopyMessage
data.value: A new asset will be created with your edits. The original image will not be changed.

data.name: SaveCopyDialog_Title
data.value: Save as copy

data.name: SaveCopyDialog_NameLabel
data.value: File name

data.name: SaveCopyDialog_FormatLabel
data.value: File format

data.name: SaveCopyDialog_Hint
data.value: The original image will not be changed.

data.name: SaveCopyDialog_CollectionLabel
data.value: Assign to collection

data.name: Progress_Uploading
data.value: Uploading edited image...

data.name: Progress_Processing
data.value: Processing...

data.name: Progress_SavingOverlay
data.value: Saving your image...

data.name: Progress_SavingOverlayHint
data.value: Uploading and processing — this may take a moment.

data.name: Progress_ProcessingOverlay
data.value: Processing your image...

data.name: Progress_ProcessingOverlayHint
data.value: Generating thumbnails and extracting metadata. Almost there.

data.name: Progress_ProcessingTimeout
data.value: Processing is taking longer than expected. You’ll be redirected — the asset will finish processing in the background.

data.name: Error_AssetNotFound
data.value: This asset doesn't exist or has been deleted.

data.name: Error_NotAnImage
data.value: Only image assets can be edited.

data.name: Error_NotReady
data.value: This image is currently being processed. Please try again later.

data.name: Error_NoPermission
data.value: You don't have permission to edit this asset.

data.name: Error_EditorLoadFailed
data.value: The image editor failed to load. Please refresh the page or try again later.

data.name: Error_TooLarge
data.value: This image is too large to edit in the browser ({0}). Consider downloading, editing locally, and re-uploading.

data.name: Error_SaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save the edited image. Your changes have not been lost — please try saving again.

data.name: Error_ConcurrentEdit
data.value: This image was modified by another user while you were editing. Please reload and try again.

data.name: Text_UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

data.name: Tip_OriginalPreserved
data.value: Tip: Your original image is preserved when you choose 'Save as copy'.

data.name: Success_Replaced
data.value: Image replaced successfully. Processing will start shortly.

data.name: Success_SavedAsCopy
data.value: Copy saved successfully. Redirecting to the new asset...
